---
title: "Step-2"
author: "William Cuthbert"
format: html
---



Potential quesion and statistical summary (involving function and iteration from the existing variable columns)

"How do measles total and rubella total differ by region?"

```{r}

summary_diff <- function(measles, rubella) {
  data.frame(
    m_mean = mean(as.numeric(measles)),
    r_mean = mean(as.numeric(rubella)),
    differ = mean(as.numeric(measles)) - mean(as.numeric(rubella))
  )
}
```


```{r}
region_diff <- cases_year |>
  group_by(region, year) |>
  summarise(summary_diff(measles_total, rubella_total), .groups = "drop")

region_diff

```
